title: Marketplace
subtitle: Browse, sell, save, and manage community marketplace listings.

featureGate.title: Marketplace is not available
featureGate.description: This community has not enabled marketplace listings.

empty.title: No marketplace listings yet
empty.subtitle: Try another search or post the first listing.

detail.title: Listing details
detail.invalidHint: We could not identify which listing to open.
detail.notFoundHint: This item may have been sold, removed, or moved.
detail.orderCreatedHint: Order {{order}} was created. Payment and delivery details can be managed from orders.
detail.reportHint: Reports are reviewed by the community team. Include enough detail to help moderation make a fair decision.
detail.reportDescriptionPlaceholder: Explain what looks wrong or unsafe about this listing.
detail.reportRequired: Describe the issue before submitting the report.
detail.reportSubmittedHint: Thank you. The moderation team will review this listing.

forms.subtitle: Use the same marketplace fields as the web app so buyers get complete details.
forms.title: Title
forms.taglinePlaceholder: A quick summary for browsing cards
forms.descriptionPlaceholder: Condition, measurements, collection details, and anything buyers should know.
forms.locationPlaceholder: Where can buyers collect or view it?
forms.mediaHint: Add up to 8 images now. Reordering and video upload remain available on the web seller tools.
forms.permissionMessage: Please allow access to your photo library to add marketplace images.
forms.footerSubtitle: Publish the listing when the details are ready.

myListings.title: My listings
myListings.subtitle: Manage active listings, renew items, and review sales signals.
myListings.emptyHint: Create a listing to start selling in your community.

active.title: No active listings
active.subtitle: Publish a listing to start selling in your community.

draft.title: No draft listings
draft.subtitle: Draft listings you are preparing will appear here.

sold.title: No sold listings
sold.subtitle: Completed marketplace sales will appear here.

expired.title: No expired listings
expired.subtitle: Expired listings will appear here so you can renew them.

onboardingNudge.title: Complete your seller setup
onboardingNudge.subtitle: Add seller details, branding, and payment readiness to unlock a stronger marketplace profile.

offers.title: Marketplace offers
offers.subtitle: Review received offers and track offers you have made.
offers.messagePlaceholder: Add a note for the seller
offers.sentHint: The seller can now accept, decline, or counter.
offers.emptyHint: Offers you send or receive will appear here.
offers.counterMessagePlaceholder: Explain the revised price or pickup terms

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Track purchases and sales from marketplace checkout.
orders.paymentStartedHint: Open checkout to finish paying for this order.
orders.paymentClientSecretHint: The payment is ready. Complete checkout from the secure payment sheet or web checkout.
orders.paymentFailed: Could not restart checkout for this order.
orders.shipHint: Add tracking details so the buyer can follow the delivery.
orders.cancelReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this order is being cancelled.
orders.cancelReasonRequired: Add a reason before cancelling the order.
orders.disputeDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what happened and what resolution you need.
orders.disputeDescriptionRequired: Describe the issue before opening a dispute.
orders.deliveryOffersEmptyHint: Community delivery offers for this order will appear here.
orders.emptyHint: Marketplace purchases and sales will appear here.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.couponAppliedHint: The coupon will be included when you buy this item.
checkout.invalidCoupon: This coupon code could not be applied.
checkout.clientSecretHint: The order was created. Complete payment from the web checkout if the payment sheet does not open on this device.

communityDelivery.title: Community delivery
communityDelivery.description: A trusted member can offer to deliver this order for time credits after checkout.
communityDelivery.step1: The buyer creates an order for this community-delivery listing.
communityDelivery.step2: Eligible community members can offer delivery time and requested credits.
communityDelivery.step3: The buyer or seller accepts an offer, then confirms delivery when the item arrives.
communityDelivery.orderHint: Mobile can manage delivery offers from Marketplace orders once an order exists. A public delivery discovery route is not available from the backend yet.

pickup.mySubtitle: Show pickup reservations and QR codes for marketplace orders.
pickup.noPickupsHint: Pickup reservations from marketplace checkout will appear here.

publicCoupons.title: Marketplace coupons
publicCoupons.subtitle: Browse active merchant coupons and open a checkout code or in-store QR.
publicCoupons.emptyHint: Merchant coupons will appear here when sellers publish them.
publicCoupons.unavailableSubtitle: This community has not enabled marketplace coupons.
publicCoupons.scanAtCheckout: Ask the seller to scan this QR code at checkout.

seller.title: Seller profile
seller.notFoundHint: This seller profile is not available.
seller.emptyHint: This seller does not have public listings right now.

free.title: Free items
free.subtitle: Browse items your community is giving away.
free.loadMoreFailed: Could not load more free items.
free.emptySubtitle: When members give items away, they will appear here.

category.title: Category
category.subtitle: Filter this category by search and condition.
category.notFoundHint: This category could not be opened.
category.emptySubtitle: Try another search or browse the full marketplace.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Review saved marketplace collections and run saved searches.
collections.emptyHint: Create collections from marketplace tools, then add listings as you browse.
collections.addFailed: Could not add this listing to the collection.

savedSearches.emptyHint: Save marketplace searches from tools to run them again quickly.
savedSearches.deleteFailed: Could not delete this saved search.

tools.title: Marketplace tools
tools.subtitle: Manage saved searches, collections, promotions, pickup slots, and seller coupons.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Group useful listings into private or public collections.
collections.name: Name

savedSearches.title: Saved searches
savedSearches.subtitle: Save a marketplace search and keep alerts close to the mobile app.
savedSearches.name: Name

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.subtitle: Promote your listings and review active promotion metrics.
promotions.noProductsHint: Promotion products will appear here when this marketplace enables them.

pickups.title: Pickups
pickups.subtitle: Create click-and-collect slots, scan pickup QR codes, and review reservations.
pickups.slotFailed: Could not create this pickup slot.
pickups.scanFailed: Could not scan this pickup code.
pickups.deleteFailed: Could not delete this pickup slot.

coupons.title: Seller coupons
coupons.subtitle: Create and manage merchant coupons for marketplace checkout.
coupons.name: Coupon title

map.title: Nearby marketplace
map.subtitle: Find marketplace listings close to a latitude and longitude.
map.helper: Mobile uses the backend nearby endpoint. A full map view can be layered on later without changing the listing data.
map.invalidCoordinates: Enter a valid latitude and longitude.
map.loadFailed: Could not load nearby marketplace listings.
map.startSubtitle: Search by coordinates to browse nearby marketplace listings.
map.emptySubtitle: Try a wider radius or another location.

advancedSearch.title: Advanced search
advancedSearch.subtitle: Use the same marketplace filters as the web app to narrow results quickly.
advancedSearch.placeholder: Search by title, keyword, or seller...
advancedSearch.loadMoreFailed: Could not load more search results.
advancedSearch.emptySubtitle: Try fewer filters or a different search term.

shipping.title: Shipping options
shipping.subtitle: Create the courier choices buyers can use during marketplace checkout.
shipping.emptyHint: Add at least one option if sellers can ship marketplace orders.
shipping.validation: Courier name and a valid price are required.
shipping.saveFailed: Could not save this shipping option.
shipping.deleteFailed: Could not delete this shipping option.

merchantOnboarding.title: Seller setup
merchantOnboarding.subtitle: Create the mobile seller profile used by marketplace buyers.
merchantOnboarding.completeSubtitle: Your marketplace seller profile is complete.
merchantOnboarding.bioPlaceholder: What you sell, how pickup works, and what buyers can expect.
merchantOnboarding.hoursHint: Standard weekday hours are saved by default on mobile. Advanced opening-hour editing remains available on the web seller tools.
merchantOnboarding.avatarUrlPlaceholder: Upload or paste an image URL
merchantOnboarding.reviewHint: Review these seller details before launching your marketplace profile.
merchantOnboarding.avatarFailed: Could not upload the seller profile photo.
merchantOnboarding.step1Required: Display name, bio, and business name are required for business sellers.
merchantOnboarding.avatarRequired: Add a profile image before completing seller setup.

stripeOnboarding.title: Payment setup
stripeOnboarding.subtitle: Connect Stripe so marketplace buyers can pay securely.
stripeOnboarding.completeSubtitle: Stripe has confirmed that payments and payouts are available.
stripeOnboarding.needBankHint: Stripe asks for payout details directly in its secure onboarding flow.
stripeOnboarding.needIdentityHint: Stripe may ask for identity or business verification depending on seller type.
stripeOnboarding.secureHint: The mobile app opens Stripe onboarding in the browser and returns here for status checks.
stripeOnboarding.balanceSubtitle: Track marketplace funds from completed Stripe payments.
stripeOnboarding.payoutHistoryHint: Recent marketplace payments and payout status.
